name: Thunder Power Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Corporate History and Background FLFV Prior to June 21, 2024, we were known as Feutune Light Acquisition Corporation, a Delaware corporation (FLFV), and Feutune Light Merger Sub, Inc., a Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of FLFV (Merger Sub). On October 26, 2023, we entered into a business combination agreement (as amended, the Business Combination Agreement) with Thunder Power Holdings Limited, a British Virgin Islands company (Thunder Power), pursuant to which on June 21,...
